question: How does the proofing process work?
answer: We go the extra mile to make sure we don't start printing until we're all on the same page. Once we receive your art and product description, we create a digital mock-up (proof) of your design. We won't start printing until you've approved it or we've made any requested changes. In some cases we'll print a physical sample for approval before the full run. Pre-photo approval is free of charge; additional requests are $20. Approval photos incur press wait times: Manual $75/hr, Auto $225/hr.
